name: Kimi K3
tagline: Moonshot's 2.8-trillion-parameter MoE flagship: 1M context, native multimodal, released July 2026.
metaDescription: Kimi K3 is Moonshot's 2.8T-parameter MoE flagship: 1M-token context, native text/vision/video, released 2026-07-16 at $3.00/$15.00 per 1M tokens.
parameters: 2.8T total · ~16 of 896 experts active per token
architecture: Mixture-of-Experts (Stable LatentMoE) with Kimi Delta Attention and Attention Residuals
overview: Kimi K3 is Moonshot AI's flagship large language model, a 2.8-trillion-parameter Mixture-of-Experts system built on a new architecture that combines Stable LatentMoE (activating roughly 16 of 896 experts per token) with Kimi Delta Attention and Attention Residuals. It was released on July 16, 2026 and runs with a 1,048,576-token context window and native multimodal input across text, images, and video.

The model is served through Kimi.com, the Kimi mobile app, Kimi Work, Kimi Code, and the Kimi API. On launch it uses maximum thinking effort by default, with low- and high-effort modes noted as follow-on updates. Moonshot published a broad benchmark comparison at launch that positions K3 competitively with Anthropic's Claude Fable 5 and OpenAI's GPT-5.6 Sol across coding, agentic, reasoning, and vision suites.
API pricing is $0.30 per million input tokens on a cache hit, $3.00 per million on a cache miss, and $15.00 per million output tokens. Full model weights are announced for release by July 27, 2026.
strengths: Very large 2.8T-parameter MoE built with a new Stable LatentMoE + Kimi Delta Attention architecture
Native multimodal input across text, vision, and video with a 1M-token context
Strong agentic performance (91.2 on BrowseComp, 30.8 on Automation Bench, 73.5 on DECK-Bench in the maker's launch table)
Competitive coding (77.8 on Program Bench, 88.3 on Terminal Bench 2.1, 42.0 on SWE Marathon)
useCases: Reach for it for long-horizon agentic coding and browser/tool workflows that need a very long context.
Reach for it when a task needs a native multimodal frontier model that can read images, charts, and video alongside text.
Reach for it when you want a frontier-class model from a Chinese lab with an open-weight release on the near horizon.

comparisonTable.caption: Kimi K3 benchmark comparison as published by Moonshot on the K3 launch page.

faq.a: Moonshot AI released Kimi K3 on July 16, 2026. It is generally available through Kimi.com, the Kimi mobile app, Kimi Work, Kimi Code, and the Kimi API. Full model weights are announced for release by July 27, 2026.

faq.q: How much does Kimi K3 cost on the API?
faq.a: Kimi K3 is billed at $0.30 per million input tokens on a cache hit, $3.00 per million input tokens on a cache miss, and $15.00 per million output tokens on the Kimi platform.

faq.q: What is the context window of Kimi K3?
faq.a: Kimi K3 has a 1,048,576-token context window (roughly 1M tokens) and accepts native text, image, and video input.

faq.q: What architecture does Kimi K3 use?
faq.a: Kimi K3 is a 2.8-trillion-parameter Mixture-of-Experts model built on Moonshot's Stable LatentMoE (activating roughly 16 of 896 experts per token) with Kimi Delta Attention and Attention Residuals.

versionHistory.note: New-generation 2.8T MoE flagship with native multimodal (text/vision/video) and 1M context.
